'''βàöch-h-n-ng''' ('''kachahnengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telepathise|telepathise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telepathise|telepathise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöch-h-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kachahnengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichahnengoko|thichahnengoko]] || [[word:jichahnengoko|jichahnengoko]] || [[word:shichahnengoko|shichahnengoko]] || [[word:kichahnengoko|kichahnengoko]]
|-

|-
